import { CAREERS, SALARY_DATA, SUBJECTS, MONTHLY_PROGRESS } from '../data'; // ───────────────────────────────────────────── // CAREER GUIDANCE // ───────────────────────────────────────────── export function CareerGuidance({ onNavigate }) { const maxSal = Math.max(...SALARY_DATA.map(d => d.value)); return (

🚀 Career Guidance

AI-curated career paths based on your Science (PCM) profile

{/* Career Cards */}
{CAREERS.map((c, i) => (
{c.icon}
{c.title}
{c.salary}
📈 {c.growth}
{c.desc}
Key Skills: {c.skills}
))}
{/* Salary Chart */}
💰 Average Salary Comparison 2025 (₹ LPA)
Max Package
{SALARY_DATA.map(d => (
₹{d.value}L
{d.label}
))}
); } // ───────────────────────────────────────────── // COURSE RECOMMENDER // ───────────────────────────────────────────── import { COURSES } from '../data'; export function CourseRecommender() { return (

📚 Course Recommender

Personalized courses based on your interests and skills

{/* Filter bar */}
{COURSES.map((c, i) => (
{c.icon}
{c.badge}
{c.title}
{c.platform} · {c.duration} · {c.level}
⭐ {c.rating} {c.price}
))}
); } // ───────────────────────────────────────────── // PERFORMANCE ANALYTICS // ───────────────────────────────────────────── export function PerformanceAnalytics() { const maxMonth = Math.max(...MONTHLY_PROGRESS.map(m => m.score)); return (

📈 Performance Analytics

Track progress, identify weak areas, and optimize your study plan

● Updated Today
{/* Stat Row */}
{[ { label: 'Overall Score', value: '88%', sub: 'Strong performer', icon: '🏆', color: '#00e5b4', accent: '#00e5b4' }, { label: 'Weak Subjects', value: '2', sub: 'Math, Chemistry', icon: '⚠️', color: '#ffb830', accent: '#ffb830' }, { label: 'Mock Tests Done', value: '18', sub: 'This month', icon: '📝', color: '#6c63ff', accent: '#6c63ff' }, { label: 'Study Hours', value: '142h', sub: 'This month', icon: '⏱️', color: '#a855f7', accent: '#a855f7' }, ].map((s, i) => (
{s.icon}
{s.label}
{s.value}
{s.sub}
))}
{/* Subject Performance */}
📊 Subject Performance
{SUBJECTS.map(s => (
{s.name} {s.weak && Weak} {s.score}%
))}
{/* Monthly Progress */}
📅 Monthly Progress
{MONTHLY_PROGRESS.map((m, i) => (
{m.score}%
= 4 ? '#00e5b4' : '#6c63ff' }} />
{m.month}
))}
{/* Weak Area Deep Dive */}
⚠️ Weak Area Analysis
Action Required
{SUBJECTS.filter(s => s.weak).map(s => (
{s.name}
{s.name === 'Mathematics' ? 'Integral Calculus, Differential Equations, Coordinate Geometry' : 'Organic Reactions, Electrochemistry, Surface Chemistry'}
Score: {s.score}% · Target: {s.name === 'Mathematics' ? 80 : 85}%+
💡 Tip: {s.name === 'Mathematics' ? 'Practice 5 integration problems daily and revise D/I formula.' : 'Focus on named reactions in Organic. Make a reactions chart.'}
))}
Physics ⭐
Strong performer — Keep up the momentum!
Score: 91% · Excellent
🚀 Next: Attempt JEE Advanced level problems to push beyond 95%.
); }
